description: Valley identifies anonymous B2B website visitors and books sales calls with AI-personalized LinkedIn outreach.
tagline: Book sales calls from your website traffic
overview: Valley identifies B2B website visitors, researches them, and runs AI-personalized LinkedIn outreach to book sales calls, combining intent data and message crafting in one platform.
what_is: Valley is an AI-powered outbound sales tool that identifies anonymous website visitors, researches their profiles, and sends hyper-personalized LinkedIn messages. It combines intent data, visitor research, and message crafting in a single platform to lift response rates.

It is best for sales teams automating LinkedIn lead generation and outreach to book qualified calls, often within days of setup. Valley tracks website intent and manages LinkedIn sequences, focusing on LinkedIn-based outbound and visitor identification rather than acting as a full CRM or email marketing tool.
